command:
curl -s https://ollama.com/api/tags | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
models = data.get('models', []) or []
if not models:
    print('No models found via API.')
else:
    for m in sorted(models, key=lambda x: x.get('modified_at', ''), reverse=True)[:20]:
        name = m.get('name', 'unknown')
        mod = m.get('modified_at', 'unknown')
        size = m.get('size', 0)
        size_gb = size / (1024**3) if size else 0
        print(f'{name} | {mod} | {size_gb:.1f} GB')
"

curl -s https://ollama.com/library | python3 -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read() # Extract model names from meta tags or links models = re.findall(r']+href=\"/library/([^\"/]+)\"[^>]*>([^<]+)', html) if not models: models = re.findall(r'href=\"/library/([^\"/]+)', html) models = sorted(set(m[0] if isinstance(m, tuple) else m)) for m in models[:50]: print(m) print(f'Total found: {len(models)}') "

command:
curl -s https://ollama.com/library | python3 -c "
import sys, re
html = sys.stdin.read()
models = set()
for m in re.findall(r'href=\"/library/([^\"/]+)', html):
    models.add(m)
for name in sorted(models)[:50]:
    print(name)
print(f'Total unique: {len(models)}')
"

command:
curl -s https://ollama.com/api/tags | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
models = data.get('models', [])
for m in models:
    name = m['name']
    size_gb = m['size'] / 1e9
    mod = m.get('modified_at', '')[:10]
    params = m.get('details', {}).get('parameter_size', 'N/A')
    print(f'{name:40s}  {size_gb:6.1f} GB  {mod}  {params}')
"
